ham.subject: Out of Office: Alex Thompson will return on 15 May 2026
ham.body:
Hello Team,

Thank you for your email. I am currently out of the office and will return on 15 May 2026. During this period, I will have limited access to my inbox.

If you require immediate assistance, please contact our support desk at support@acmecorp.com or call +1-555-987-6543.

Best regards,

Alex Thompson
Senior Project Manager
Acme Corporation

spam.subject: Your Income Tax Refund is Pending – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear Taxpayer,

Our records indicate that you are eligible for an Income Tax refund. To release the refund to your account, we must verify your identity and account details. Failure to comply within 48 hours may result in the forfeiture of your refund.

Please click the secure link below to submit the required information:
<URL>

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,

Income Tax Department
Official Tax Authority
